description: Log in as admin/district. Configure two automated notifications for the TB Treatment Card programme. Create a notification named 'TB Case Enrollment Alert' triggered on program enrollment and sent to users at the organisation unit to notify them of a new TB case enrollment. Create a second notification named 'TB Treatment Follow-up Reminder' triggered 7 days after the scheduled due date and sent to users at the organisation unit to warn about overdue follow-up. Both templates must be saved and associated with the TB programme.
